info.title: Clockin Mobile API
info.description: Reconstructed from openapi-typescript-codegen client embedded in the Clockin Capacitor app source maps.

get.summary: Get all absences that belong to the employee of the authenticated user

post.summary: Store an absence.

get.summary: Get the ordered default absence types for the authenticated user
Get the id and name of all possible Substitutes for a given time period

post.summary: Extract the text content of an image.

400.description: The feature is disabled for this company.

post.summary: Starts interactive Realtime session, returns ephermal token.

400.description: The feature is disabled for this company.

400.description: The feature is disabled for this company.

post.summary: Transcribe audio to text with segment-level timestamps.

400.description: The feature is disabled for this company.

get.summary: Get all app onboarding tour progresses for the authenticated employee

post.summary: Record completion or skip of an app onboarding tour Idempotent upsert for a single tour. `completed` is a terminal state — once a tour is marked as completed it cannot be downgraded to `skipped`.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Unique string key identifying the tour (e.g. `time_tracking`, `absences`)

post.summary: Authenticate as device or employee with a code
Authenticate with email and password to get an auth token
Authenticate as employee on multiuserdevice for self service area

get.summary: Get a signed url for sso
Get a signed url for sso

post.summary: Authorize a QR login token scanned from web frontend Allows an authenticated mobile app user to authorize a QR login token displayed on the web frontend. The token is short-lived (5 minutes) and can only be used once. After authorization, the web frontend user will be logged in as this user.
Logout. Invalidate token of an authenticated user.
Reset password.
Logout. Invalidate token of an authenticated device.

get.summary: Get workdays with events of the employee that is associated with the authenticated user

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: event id of the event to update

post.summary: Store an event

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: event id of the event to delete

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: transaction id of the transaction to be undone

get.summary: Get all clocked-in employees (including absent) for the admin dashboard

post.summary: Create a new employee in the authenticated user's company

get.summary: Get unchecked todos for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a new todo

get.summary: Get currently active projects (employees clocked into a project)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by project name.

get.summary: Get news feed for the admin dashboard

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter news by search term.

parameters.name: typesFilter
parameters.description: JSON-encoded array of news type strings (e.g. '["event","projectfile"]').

get.summary: Get granted absences for today (or a given date)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Filter absences by this date (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by employee name.

parameters.name: typesFilter
parameters.description: JSON-encoded array of AbsenceType integer values.

get.summary: Get pending absence requests for managed employees

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by employee name.

parameters.name: typesFilter
parameters.description: JSON-encoded array of AbsenceType integer values.

patch.summary: Update an absence request for a managed employee

get.summary: Get personal and timesheet details for a managed employee

parameters.name: employee
parameters.description: The ID of the employee. Must be a managed employee of the authenticated user.

post.summary: Generate an app invite link for a managed employee Regenerates the employee's onboarding secret and returns a link pointing to the link subdomain for app onboarding.

parameters.name: employee
parameters.description: The ID of the employee. Must be a managed employee of the authenticated user.

404.description: The requested resource was not found

post.summary: Generate a pre-signed S3 URL for debug file uploads

200.description: any Pre-signed upload URL generated successfully

get.summary: Get the device configuration
Get all Employees with projects and events which are related to requesting device
Get a single Employee

post.summary: Change PIN of single employee
Stores the push_token for the authenticated device

get.summary: Get tasksConfigs for all employees

post.summary: Upgrade old app to new by exchanging legacy token for new and generating new Device and Config

get.summary: Get all checklists

post.summary: Store a checklist.
Store a customer confirmation.
Store a project note.
Store project recording metadata and get S3 upload URL.
Mark recording upload as completed and create Projectfile.

parameters.name: projectRecordingId
parameters.description: ID of the project recording

404.description: Project recording not found or already completed

post.summary: Store a list of recorded events
Store a feature wish from users
Store a file.
Store a list of recorded locations
Store a new NFC tag
Store a new NFC tag from admin area

get.summary: Get all notes of the past 7 days for all employees assigned to the device
Gets a specific note for an employee and a day

post.summary: Store a daily Note

409.description: The resource was modified and can only be updated by a newer version.

post.summary: Mark a notification as read

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the notification to mark as read

404.description: The requested resource was not found

get.summary: Get a list of all projects
Get a specific Project by ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Id of the project to be completed

post.summary: Completes a project

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Id of the project to be completed

post.summary: Completes a projectDate

parameters.name: projectDateId
parameters.description: Id of the projectDate to be completed

post.summary: Search for projects

get.summary: Get the next upcoming shift for the authenticated user
Get all upcoming shifts for the authenticated user
Get all free (unassigned) shifts the authenticated user can apply for

post.summary: Create a wish (apply or withdraw) for a shift

403.description: Forbidden – user is not part of the shift plan or plan/revision is not active

delete.summary: Delete a pending wish (undo application or withdrawal request)

parameters.name: wish
parameters.description: ID of the wish to delete

403.description: Forbidden – wish does not belong to the user or is not pending

get.summary: Get the ongoing survey if it exists

post.summary: Store the survey Response
Update OMR app review popup status

get.summary: Get all timesheets between start and end
Downloads the timesheet for the given month
Get total flextimeBalance and holidays

post.summary: Track that the "My Area" section was opened
Store a TravelLog
Update a TravelLog
